email.confirm.subject: Confirm Your Account
email.confirm.html:
Hi {{username}},

To confirm your account please use this token: {{token}}

Note: replies to this email address are not monitored.
email.reset.subject: Reset Your Password
email.reset.text:
Hi {{username}},

To reset your password please use this token: {{token}}

If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email.

Note: replies to this email address are not monitored.
email.reset.html:
Hi {{username}},

To reset your password please use this token: {{token}}

If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email.

Note: replies to this email address are not monitored.
email.changeEmail.subject: Confirm Your New Email Address
email.changeEmail.html:
Hi {{username}},

To confirm your new email address please use this token: {{token}}

Note: replies to this email address are not monitored.
